message:
🐛 Always show cluster name badges on compliance cards (#2170)

Cluster name badges were only shown when multiple clusters had a tool
installed (length > 1). This hid useful context when a single cluster
was connected — users couldn't see which cluster the data came from.

Changed the guard to show badges whenever at least one cluster is
installed, and always display the cluster name on individual policy rows.

Affects: KyvernoPolicies, TrivyScan, KubescapeScan cards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
